title: sclerolaena astrocarpa
intro: Sclerolaena astrocarpa, also known as Astrocarpa or desert raisin, is a plant species native to Western Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Sclerolaena astrocarpa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. Sclerolaena astrocarpa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in some traditional remedies, such as a poultice to soothe skin irritations.
